'''Morr Wenn''' was [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon's]] servant. Wenn carried out household tasks on Tallon's home while he was living on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] with his wife [[Kay Tallon|Kay]]. [[Cala Wenn]] worked at the same home. He was not a brave man, but was loyal to Tallon. Years later, Adar Tallon decided to [[Escape from Tatooine|leave]] Tatooine with his wife and droid [[LN-26]]. The Wenns were left behind.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]'' {{Reprint|Tatooine Manhunt}} {{1st}}
